news.summary: A major development has taken place as Techy, a renowned company specializing in device repairs, buyback initiatives, and smart device solutions, made public its acquisition of a prominent organization on July 3, 2025. This strategic move brings together two key players in the industry to establish an extensive network offering tech support services. The acquisition is expected to significantly enhance Techy's market presence and capabilities.
news.headline: Techy acquires NerdsToGo to create a comprehensive tech support network, solidifying its global presence.

news.summary: In CENTER VALLEY, Pennsylvania, Shift4 Payments, Inc. (NYSE: FOUR) shared today that they will be issuing dividends for their 6% Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock, totaling 10,000,000 shares, which were initially distributed on May 5, 2025. The company's Board of Directors declared a dividend amounting to $1.45 per share. This dividend is set to be paid out in cash on August 1, 2025, specifically to shareholders of record as of the closing of business on July 15, 2025. The details of the dividend payment are subject to the terms outlined in the Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock agreement.
news.headline: Shift4 Payments declares $1.45 per share dividend on 10,000,000 Series A Preferred Stock, payable on Aug 1, 2025 to shareholders on record by July 15, 2025.

news.summary: A research study is set to evaluate the practical effectiveness of tri-layer and single-layer amnion grafts in healing diabetic foot and venous leg ulcers. The study is conducted by BioLab Holdings, Inc., a medical manufacturer in Phoenix. This study aims to provide valuable insights into the treatment of these ulcers. This research is crucial due to the large number of individuals affected by these conditions. This study will be significant in shaping the future of wound healing and regenerative medicine.
news.headline: BioLab Holdings, Inc. starts multicenter clinical trial testing amnion grafts on chronic wounds. Study to evaluate effectiveness. (Numbers not available)

news.summary: The company has surpassed its Core Adjusted EBITDA guidance, with the latest figures exceeding expectations. Despite this positive development, the company is maintaining its outlook for the fiscal year 2026. This decision comes as the company's AI-Centric Global Capability Center strategy gains momentum, leading to accelerated growth. This indicates a strong performance in the AI sector, promising continued success for the company in the foreseeable future.
news.headline: Aeries Technology exceeds FY 2025 earnings expectations with strong Core Adjusted EBITDA; re-affirms FY 2026 outlook with AI strategy.

news.summary: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida on July 3, 2025, Rafferty Domnick Cunningham & Yaffa shared that a number of its lawyers have been recognized on the respected 2025 Florida Super Lawyers list. This list acknowledges outstanding legal professionals in Florida each year and serves as a testament to the expertise of these attorneys.
news.headline: Several attorneys from Rafferty Domnick Cunningham & Yaffa earn spots on 2025 Florida Super Lawyers List.

news.summary: A new study revealed that approximately 25% of adults in the United States have reported feeling anxious most of the time during the past month. The survey, which included over 5,000 participants, found that women were more likely than men to experience ongoing anxiety. Additionally, individuals between the ages of 18 and 34 were the most affected demographic, with 30% reporting persistent anxiety. The results indicate a concerning prevalence of anxiety among adults in the country.
news.headline: Grayscale expresses surprise at SEC's pause on trading ETF holding Solana and XRP.

news.summary: On July 03, 2025, Magnetic North Acquisition Corp. (TSXV: MNC; MNC.PR.A) disclosed that the Alberta Securities Commission issued a cease trade order against them due to non-submission of audited annual financial statements, management discussion and analysis, and related certifications for the year ending December 31, 2024, alongside condensed interim financial statements, management discussion and analysis, and certifications for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The company faced unforeseen challenges in finalizing its 2024 annual filings, which were originally due by April 30, 2025.
news.headline: Magnetic North Acquisition Corp. faces Cease Trade Order for not filing financial statements for 2024 and Q1 2025.

news.summary: The Early Care and Education Consortium (ECEC) has commended Congress for the $16 billion allocation towards child care tax incentives in the recently passed One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBA) on July 3, 2025. This legislation received approval from both chambers, signaling a significant step towards improving support for early care and education services.
news.headline: Early Care & Education Consortium praises Congress for $16 billion in child care tax incentives in OBBA Act, July 3, 2025.

news.summary: Vancouver, BC - Diversified Royalty Corp. (TSX: DIV and DIV.DB.A) has raised its annual dividend from 25.0 cents to 27.5 cents per share starting July 1, 2025, as previously declared on June 17, 2025. Following this increase, the board of directors sanctioned a cash dividend of $0.02292 per common share for July 1-31, 2025, totaling $0.275 annually per common share. Shareholders as of closing on July 15, 2025, will receive the dividend on July 31, 2025.
news.headline: Diversified Royalty Corp. increases annual dividend from 25.0 to 27.5 cents per share, paying $0.02292 per share on July 31, 2025.

news.summary: Origin Investment Corp I recently completed its IPO, selling 6,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit, with each unit containing one ordinary share and one-half of a redeemable warrant. The units are now trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol “ORIQU”. Each whole warrant allows the holder to buy one ordinary share at $11.50 per share. The warrants become exercisable 30 days post the company's initial business combination and expire five years post the combination or earlier upon redemption or liquidation. When the units start trading separately, ordinary shares and warrants are expected to trade under “ORIQ” and “ORIQW” respectively on Nasdaq. The underwriters have a 45-day option to buy up to 900,000 more units at the IPO price.
news.headline: Origin Investment Corp I closed a $60,000,000 IPO, offering 6,000,000 units at $10 per unit on Nasdaq under the ticker "ORIQU".

news.summary: Ontario-based Bird Construction Inc. (TSX: BDT) has revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, August 13, 2025, post-market closure. To delve into these results, a conference call and live webcast have been scheduled for Thursday, August 14, 2025, set to commence at 10:00 a.m. (ET).
news.headline: Bird Construction Inc. (TSX: BDT) to release 2025 Q2 financial results on August 13, followed by conference call on August 14 at 10:00 a.m. (ET).

news.summary: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (TSX/NYSE: AQN) based in OAKVILLE, Ontario, has confirmed its intention to unveil its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on Friday, August 8, 2025, before the market opens. The scheduled earnings conference call will take place at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day, led by CEO Rod West, and the Interim Chief Financial Officer combined with the Vice President of Investor Relations, Brian Chin. Interested individuals can join the conference call on Friday.
news.headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp to release Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 8, 2025 before market open. Earnings call at 8:30 am ET.

news.summary: On July 1, 2025, Anika Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANIK) based in Bedford, Mass., granted non-statutory stock options for 2,500 shares of common stock. The options were given to a newly hired non-executive employee at an exercise price of $10.53 per share, matching the closing price of the stock on the Nasdaq Global Select Market on the grant date. This grant was issued under the Anika Therapeutics, Inc. 2021 Inducement Plan and approved by the compensation committee of the board of directors. The purpose of the grant, which falls under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4), was to incentivize the new employee to join Anika and was a key component of their overall compensation package.
news.headline: Anika granted 2,500 non-statutory stock options at $10.53 per share to a new non-executive employee on July 1, 2025.

news.summary: In Carmel, Indiana, on July 3, 2025, Blue & Co., LLC, a financial consulting firm, announced a potential privacy breach impacting specific individuals' information. Despite no proof of fraudulent activity involving the individuals' data, the company highlighted the event as a precautionary measure.
news.headline: Blue & Co., LLC notifies of data event affecting privacy of individuals' information on July 3, 2025 in Carmel, Indiana.

news.summary: In Petoskey, Michigan, on July 3, 2025, Arbor Associates, Inc. disclosed a data security breach potentially impacting protected health information. Arbor, a collaborator with healthcare entities for patient survey data, reported the incident.
news.headline: Data breach at Arbor Associates, Inc. in Petoskey, Mich., exposing protected health info. Details on the breach are still pending.
Canada finance minister: Path to Avoid US Tariff

news.summary: Los Angeles, July 03, 2025 - Preferred Bank (NASDAQ: PFBC), a prominent independent commercial bank in California, is set to disclose its financial results for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2025, before the market opens on Monday, July 21, 2025. On the same day, a conference call will be hosted by management at 2:00 p.m. Eastern (11:00 a.m. Pacific). The call will be broadcasted live on the internet. Interested individuals and investors can join the conference call by dialing 888-243-4451 (domestic) or 412-542-4135 (international) and mentioning "Preferred Bank." Furthermore, a live webcast of the call will be accessible at the Investor Relations section of Preferred Bank's website at www.preferredbank.com. The call will feature Preferred Bank's Chairman and CEO Li Yu, President and Chief Operating Officer Wellington Chen, Chief Financial Officer Edward J. Czajka, and Chief Credit Officer. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Preferred Bank will release Q2 financial results on July 21, 2025. Conference call at 2:00 p.m. Eastern, dial-in 888-243-4451.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, TransAlta Corporation, listed on TSX as TA and NYSE as TAC, is set to announce its Q2 2025 results on August 1, 2025. The release will be prior to market opening. Interested parties, including investors, analysts, and media personnel, can join a conference call and webcast on the same day at 9:00 a.m. Mountain Time (11:00 a.m. ET) to discuss the outcomes.
news.headline: TransAlta to host Q2 2025 results conference call on August 1st at 9:00am MT/11:00am ET. Market results released that day.

news.summary: In Boston on July 3, 2025, Teamsters Local 25 members at Republic Services are wrapping up their first week of striking after a vote passed with over 90 percent in favor on Monday. Despite the strong support for the strike, the workers have yet to receive a fair offer from the company.
news.headline: Teamsters at Republic Services demand fair offer after 90% vote for strike, reaching first week of work stoppage.

news.summary: In Greenwich, Connecticut, on July 1, 2025, GAMCO Investors, Inc. disclosed that assets under management (AUM) reached $33.3 billion by June 30, 2025, marking an increase from $30.7 billion reported on June 30, 2024. Gabelli's AUM rose by $2.6 billion over the course of a year, reflecting growth in their managed assets.
news.headline: GAMCO predicts Q2 2025 EPS $0.89-$0.94; AUM increased to $33.3B from $30.7B YoY.

news.summary: Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. revealed today that during the special meetings on July 1, 2025, the stockholders of Lake Shore Federal Bancorp and the members of Lake Shore, MHC approved the Amended and Restated Plan of Conversion and Reorganization. This plan is linked to Lake Shore, MHC's transition from a mutual holding company to a fully public stock holding company and the Bank's shift from a federal savings bank to a New York chartered commercial bank. Lake Shore Federal Bancorp trades under NASDAQ: LSBK.
news.headline: Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. reports approval of conversion plan at special meetings on July 1, 2025.

news.summary: An agreement has been reached outlining the substantial involvement of Mishkeegogamang First Nation in the conscientious advancement of the Springpole Gold Project. This agreement aims to reduce environmental impacts and offer direct benefits to the community. It emphasizes increased cooperation on various aspects of the project, ensuring a sustainable approach to development.
news.headline: Mishkeegogamang First Nation and First Mining sign agreement for Springpole Gold Project, focusing on community benefit and environmental responsibility.

news.summary: In a recent announcement from CareQuest Institute in Boston, a statement was released in response to the passing of a tax and spending package. This package includes significant cutbacks in funding to the Medicaid program.
news.headline: CareQuest Institute is concerned about Medicaid cuts affecting dental access due to a tax and spending package.

news.summary: In Park City, Utah, on July 3, 2025, EQV Ventures Acquisition Corp. II completed its initial public offering, which included the sale of 42,000,000 units (originally set at 35,000,000 units) at $10.00 per unit. Additionally, 4,000,000 units were sold at the same price through the underwriter's partial exercise of its over-allotment option. The total gross proceeds of the offering reached $460 million before subtracting underwriting discounts, commissions, and other offering expenses borne by the Company. EQV Ventures Acquisition Corp. II is a special purpose acquisition company sponsored by an EQV Group affiliate, established with the aim of merging with one or more businesses.
news.headline: EQV Ventures Acquisition Corp. II closes its $460 million IPO, upsized from $350 million, selling 42M units at $10 each.

news.summary: Today, the U.S. House of Representatives approved the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, which includes reductions of hundreds of billions of dollars to the Medicaid program. This move is expected to have a severe impact on mental health care services. The bill's passage in Arlington, Va., on July 3, 2025, signals a significant cut to essential programs that support the most vulnerable populations.
news.headline: US House passed One Big Beautiful Bill Act, cutting billions from Medicaid; impacts mental health care. devastating for millions.
